text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're just coming back from break and I'm
scheduled to have a meeting with Fuji Kiseki. I
step in my office to find...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer! I was just resting my eyes, I swear!
choice_data_list: You can't lie to me. You were snoring.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I'm sorry you had to see me like that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: One of my residents was inconsolable with homesickness last night, so I stayed by her side until she fell asleep... Yaaawn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki must not have gotten enough sleep
herself because of that. She looks exhausted.
